title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment
description: 1 bedroom basement apartment for rent. Move-in ready. $950/month. Water, gas and electric utilities included. 1 year lease minimum. No pets, no smoking. W/D hookups. title: Private room for rent
description:
🌸✨ URGENT – Female Private Room Available (Contract Takeover) ✨🌸

Hi girls! I need someone to take over my contract ASAP 💛

💲 $450/month + utilities (utilities are usually under $70 and go down in the summer ☀️)

📍 Amazing location in Provo:
• Near Provo Train Station 🚆
• Close to multiple bus stops 🚌
• Walking distance to Domino’s, Subway, Maverik & Dollar General
• Near Provo Temple 🤍

✨ The apartment is super cozy and in a really pretty, safe neighborhood.
The roommates are very sweet and respectful.

💫 There are also other rooms available if you want to move with a friend!

Message me if you’re interested or if you want a tour!

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath Apartment
description:
***NEWLY RENOVATED*** This upstairs apartment has been upgraded and renovated to add great features including, new flooring, freshly painted cabinets, new closet doors, new toilet, new disposal and so much more!  The water bill is included in the rent, the electricity and gas are paid by the tenant each month. There are two uncovered parking spots for each apartment. This unit is an upstairs apartment in a 4-plex and has a nice shared grassy yard. Unfortunately no pets are allowed on the property. There are hook ups for a washer and electric dryer, however they are not provided. This apartment is ready to rent March 1st!

Please message me with any further questions!

(Please message/call/text for showing availability) 

Check out this link for more listing details! 

https://listings1059543.tenantcloud.com/listings/163249

title: 3 Beds 3 Baths - Apartment
description:
We have 2 spots available together in a spacious, fully furnished apartment just 3 blocks from BYU. Perfect for friends who want to live together!

🏠 Large upstairs loft bedroom
🛏 Shared room with walk-in closet
🚿 Private bathroom
🧺 In-unit washer & dryer
🌄 Beautiful mountain views from balcony
🚗 Underground + open parking available
✨ Tall ceilings & open living space with spiral staircase

Safe, student-friendly neighborhood.

Available: End of August
Male students only

This is a privately owned unit that has been well cared for.

Message me for pricing and details!

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
Rented to Women. This is a private bedroom with a bathroom (shared between two tenants). Selling my daughter's contract for Spring/Summer semesters, as she is graduating and moving. Available May, June, July & August. Contract available for next year as well (if want to stay for next school year). Available move in end of April after winter semester ends. Rent $575/month plus shared utilities about $45/month. Internet included. Includes reserved parking spot. Clean. Nice roommates. Great location. Buses stop regularly. Property management company is awesome to work with!

Belmont Condos- rented to women, nestled along Provo's east bench, near Seven Peaks Waterpark. Belmont Condos offers a comfortable yet fun housing experience. With spacious private rooms, with a washer/dryer in each unit. Enjoy the pool, clubhouse, hot tub, gym, and view of the mountains.
